perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man in an orange hoodie and a woman in a red hoodie stand behind a table full of Chinese New Year dishes, including a large king crab and whole fish. They wave and gesture enthusiastically at the camera. (2) The scene shifts to focus on four bottles of 'OKASANG' drinks arranged on the table; the man picks up a black bottle to show the label. (3) The woman holds two different flavored bottles, pointing to their labels as she talks. (4) Close-up shot of a yellowish liquid being poured from an 'OKASANG' bottle into a crystal glass, followed by the woman drinking it with a satisfied expression. (5) The man presents several boxes of 'Red Dates Extract', holding them up and pointing to the packaging. (6) Both characters hold the red product boxes and a red gift bag, waving and smiling to the camera in a festive finale.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat, and celebratory music plays as a male and female voice shout greetings simultaneously in an excited, high-pitched tone. (2) The male voice takes the lead, speaking Mandarin with high energy and occasional Hokkien phrases, describing the food and transitioning to the drinks. (3) The female voice joins in, her tone bright and persuasive as she describes the taste and health benefits of specific flavors. (4) Background music maintains a steady, rhythmic beat with occasional sound effects (pops/chimes) syncing with on-screen text appearances. (5) The audio concludes with a synchronized cheer from both speakers over a festive musical crescendo.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '祝大家新年快樂' (Happy New Year to everyone!) appears in festive red and yellow, establishing a celebratory tone. (2) 'OKASANG' brand name and '0卡桑' (0 calorie) are displayed prominently during product shots. (3) '成分天然' (Natural ingredients) and '30杯的紅棗茶' (Equivalent to 30 cups of red date tea) are used as decorative hooks to emphasize health benefits. (4) '新年快樂' (Happy New Year) reappears at the end in large, bold font.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro (Festive Greeting) -> Product Demo (Drinks) -> Tasting/Experience -> Supplementary Product (Extract) -> Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male creator in orange hoodie, 1 female creator in red hoodie
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A male with short brown hair wearing an orange Adidas hoodie; a female with dark hair styled in twin buns wearing a red hoodie.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, modern white kitchen with a refrigerator decorated with red 'Fu' (blessing) stickers and a red lantern hanging from the ceiling.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Demonstration -> Benefit Analysis -> Call to Action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: This video serves as a high-energy holiday endorsement for the 'OKASANG' beverage brand and its red date extract products. It leverages the context of the Chinese New Year feast to position these drinks as healthy, low-calorie alternatives to traditional sugary beverages that complement heavy festive meals.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct product display, detailed explanation of benefits, and presence of brand logo and gift bags.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Fast-talking influencers (Gaga and Paki), twin bun hairstyle, high-contrast text overlays, and festive interior decorations.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The use of specific local dialects (Hokkien) and culturally significant foods (King Crab for prosperity) strongly targets a Taiwanese audience during the Lunar New Year period.
